mapper.select:
SELECT st.id, st.user_id, st.title, st.content, st.STATUS, st.audit_remark, st.created_at, ui.NAME, ui.CODE, ui.sex, ui.images FROM stories st LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = st.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND st.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{stories.title},'%')
AND st.STATUS = #{stories.status}
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{stories.name},'%')
ORDER BY st.created_at DESC
